name: Tuna Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix all ingredients in a bowl until well combined.
3. Fill each hamburger bun with the tuna mixture.
4. Place each sandwich on a square of aluminum foil, fold the foil over securely to seal the sandwiches.
5. Arrange the sealed sandwiches on a cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 20 minutes or until heated through.
